DISCOVERY 301, JAN-29-2026 RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF MARYANN VELACRUZ TO SUBMIT TO SECOND MEDICAL EXAMINATION. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF MARYANN VELACRUZ TO SUBMIT TO A SECOND MEDICAL EXAMINATION BY NEUROLOGIST MARILYN ROBERTSON, M.D., IS GRANTED. SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. A PROPOSED ORDER HAS BEEN SUBMITTED BY THE PREVAILING PARTY. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Continued To Jan-19-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-22-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Plaintiff Maryann Velacruz To Submit To Second Medical Examination; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Aron K. Liang
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS GRM INFORMATION MANAGEMENT SERVICES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, GRM INFORMATION MANAGEMENT SERVICES OF SAN, and OUSSEMA GHAZOUANI's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Maryann Velacruz To Submit To Second Medical Examination.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's motion to compel plaintiff Maryann Velacruz to submit to a second medical examination by neurologist Marilyn Robertson, M.D., is granted. Defendant demonstrates good cause: Velacruz seeks damages for two types of injury that are commonly diagnosed and treated by doctors of different specialties. The court orders the parties to meet and confer about the examination date; the examination shall occur within 30 days unless both parties agree otherwise. The place, manner, scope, and nature of examination shall be as set out in defendant's demand for physical examination set out in Exhibit 5 to the Liang Declaration.

Defendant seeks sanctions. The court finds that plaintiff acted with substantial justification and does not award sanctions.

A proposed order has been submitted by the prevailing party.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Set For Trial On Apr-06-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
